steps.title: Vertex shortcut: minimum = $c - \dfrac{b^2}{4a}$
steps.content: For an upward parabola, the minimum value is $c - \dfrac{b^2}{4a}$. Plug in: $0 - \dfrac{(27/2)^2}{4 \cdot 1} = -\dfrac{729/4}{4} = -\dfrac{729}{16} = -\!\left(\dfrac{27}{4}\right)^2$.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: The minimum value is $-\!\left(\dfrac{27}{4}\right)^2$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
